headline: Eero’s Pro 6E routers are down to their cheapest price yet in 2026
summary: Eero Pro 6E mesh Wi-Fi routers are now at their lowest price ever. They offer fast, reliable coverage for multi-room homes. Supports beyond gigabit wired speeds for high-speed internet plans.

headline: Hackers likely hijacked over 20,000 Instagram accounts with Meta’s AI chatbot
summary: Over 20,000 Instagram accounts were likely hijacked via Meta's AI chatbot. A 'bug' allowed attackers to bypass two-factor authentication. Hackers exploited the chatbot to easily take over accounts.

headline: Microsoft’s AI chief says superintelligence is near, but won’t take your job
summary: Microsoft AI CEO Mustafa Suleyman believes superintelligence is imminent. He assures that advanced AI will not eliminate human jobs. The discussion covered AI training and future impact.

headline: Nintendo’s next Direct showcase is on June 9th
summary: Nintendo has announced its next Direct showcase event for June 9th. The stream will be followed by a Treehouse Live event. Expect significant gaming news post-Summer Game Fest.

headline: Gears of War: E-Day Preorders Are Live for Xbox Fans: Here's What Comes in Each Edition
summary: Preorders for Gears of War: E-Day are now officially live. Various editions are available with unique content. The highly anticipated game is set to release on October 6th.

headline: Preorder Elden Ring Tarnished Edition on Switch 2 at £10 off RRP
summary: Elden Ring Tarnished Edition preorders are live for Switch 2. Smyths offers the cheapest UK price at £59.99. Buyers can save £10 off the recommended retail price.

headline: France Slaps Nintendo With $46 Million Fine Over Switch Joy-Con Drift
summary: France fined Nintendo €35 million ($46 million) over Joy-Con drift issues. The sanction came from the country's consumer rights office. The fine addresses long-standing problems with Switch controllers.

headline: Netflix Reveals the Real Dog Playing Scooby-Doo in Upcoming Origins Series
summary: Netflix unveiled the actual dog cast as Scooby-Doo. The dog will star in the upcoming series 'Scooby-Doo: Origins.' This marks the first time a real canine plays the iconic role.

headline: Iran's strike on Israel suggests the regime's sense of resilience is growing
summary: Iran's recent strike on Israel signals growing regime resilience. The decision to risk peace talks reflects leaders' confidence. Analysis suggests a shift in Iran's geopolitical stance.

headline: Starmer tells Apple and Google to ban nude images on children's phones
summary: Keir Starmer urges Apple and Google to block nude images on kids' phones. Firms are expected to activate built-in features to prevent access. The call aims to protect children from explicit content.

headline: Nottingham attacks inquiry revealed miscarriage of justice, victim's mother says
summary: Victim's mother claims Nottingham attacks inquiry exposed a miscarriage of justice. Bereaved families spoke at a London press conference. The case involves Valdo Calocane and its handling.

headline: Rare footage captured of Great White shark in Mediterranean Sea
summary: Rare footage of a Great White shark filmed in the Mediterranean Sea. A volunteer diver encountered the endangered shark near Tunisia and Sicily. The diver described shaking during the extraordinary encounter.
